commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=793b393013062805193d768ff9185b4a260dbd49)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds QA-lab fallback model selection to generated gateway config and rewires the live Convex QA workflow to pass a distinct fallback model env var.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +20, Config +1. Total +22 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main accepts an alternate QA model but emits strict `{ primary }` agent model objects, and the model-failover contract requires explicit `fallbacks` for an agent primary to use fallback models. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers should inspect the draft and the pending live QA workflow proof before merge.

target.title: fix(qa): wire live fallback models
target.body:
## Summary
- Wire QA `--alt-model` into gateway model fallback config for defaults and the `qa` agent.
- Add a live QA fallback model variable, defaulting to `openai/gpt-5.4`, so secret-backed live lanes do not duplicate the gpt-5.5 primary as their only candidate.

## Verification
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/qa-lab/src/qa-gateway-config.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-gateway.runtime.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- AWS Crabbox changed gate: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
  - provider: `aws`
  - lease: `cbx_e0cc3d0d965b`
  - run: `run_076880288b17`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: live QA gateway children now get a configured fallback model when `--alt-model` differs from `--model`.
Real environment tested: local focused Vitest and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification.
Evidence after fix: unit tests passed, autoreview passed, and remote `pnpm check:changed` exited 0.
Observed result after fix: gateway config includes fallback models without changing strict single-model behavior when primary and alternate match.
What was not tested: patched secret-bearing QA-Lab live workflow has not completed yet; it will be dispatched against this draft PR head next.
target.author: vincentkoc
